title: Fix deployment errors and complete build

requirements.summary: Resolve any build errors in the frontend that are preventing successful deployment
acceptanceCriteria: No missing dependencies or import errors

file_operations.description: Review and fix any TypeScript type errors, ensure all imports resolve correctly, verify component props match expected types, and ensure state management logic is type-safe

Fix any TypeScript compilation errors related to backend interface types (BookingRequest, Time), ensure proper handling of optional fields, verify query hook usage matches expected types from useQueries
Resolve any type errors related to UserProfile interface, ensure mutation hooks are properly typed, verify dialog component props match shadcn/ui Dialog expectations
Fix TypeScript errors in form validation schema and react-hook-form integration, ensure BookingRequestInput type matches backend interface exactly, verify all form fields have correct types
Resolve type mismatches between backend interface methods and query/mutation hook implementations, ensure proper handling of Promise return types, fix any issues with Principal type usage

Fix any errors related to image asset imports, ensure generated image paths use correct workspace paths (frontend/public/assets/generated/), verify all image references include proper dimensions in filenames
Resolve any TypeScript errors in navigation logic or component prop types, ensure smooth scrolling functions are properly typed
Fix any type errors in footer component, ensure brand constants are imported correctly from constants/brand.ts

requirements.summary: Verify all imported modules and dependencies are correctly configured on the frontend
acceptanceCriteria: All npm packages are installed and compatible

file_operations.description: Verify all imports from @tanstack/react-query, react, and react-dom resolve correctly, ensure QueryClient is properly configured, verify InternetIdentityProvider import path is correct
Ensure backend actor creation uses correct canister ID and interface imports, verify @dfinity/agent imports are available, check that backend.d.ts interface is properly referenced
Verify @dfinity/identity and @dfinity/auth-client imports resolve correctly, ensure AuthClient configuration matches expected API
Verify imports from hooks/useInternetIdentity and @tanstack/react-query are correct, ensure component follows authorization component usage guidelines
Verify tailwindcss and related plugin imports are correctly configured, ensure custom theme extensions use valid Tailwind syntax
Ensure Tailwind directives are valid and CSS custom properties follow correct syntax, verify color values are properly formatted
